# FusionTik

> Free online TikTok downloader — save videos without watermark (MP4), extract audio (MP3), and download Photo Mode images. No login required.

## What is FusionTik?

FusionTik (https://fusiontik.vercel.app) is a web-based TikTok downloader built with Next.js. Users paste a TikTok URL and download content directly to their device. Files are not stored on FusionTik servers.

## Supported formats

- MP4 video without TikTok watermark
- MP3 audio extraction
- JPG/PNG images from TikTok Photo Mode (carousel posts)

## How to use

1. Copy a TikTok video or photo link (tiktok.com, vt.tiktok.com, vm.tiktok.com)
2. Paste the link at https://fusiontik.vercel.app
3. Click Download
4. Choose MP4, MP3, or image download

## Key pages

- Home / Downloader: https://fusiontik.vercel.app/
- FAQ: https://fusiontik.vercel.app/faq
- Help Center: https://fusiontik.vercel.app/help-center
- Privacy Policy: https://fusiontik.vercel.app/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://fusiontik.vercel.app/terms

## Privacy

Download history is stored locally in the user's browser only. FusionTik does not upload or store downloaded media on its servers.

## Keywords

TikTok downloader, download TikTok without watermark, TikTok MP4 download, TikTok MP3 download, TikTok Photo Mode download, TikTok downloader Indonesia, free TikTok downloader
